channel.title: Linux Performance on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Linux Performance on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: Optimize Sway on Wayland for Maximum Performance on Intel iGPU (Dual Full HD Setup)
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: A complete, high-precision performance optimization guide for Sway on Wayland using Intel integrated graphics, dual Full HD monitors, Mesa tuning, tear-free rendering, kernel parameters, and advanced compositor tweaks.
